prompt: We're running a Kubernetes cluster on GKE and want to sync secrets from Infisical to our pods using the operator. How do I set up the auth and get the operator working?

assertions.text: Recommends Kubernetes Auth as the preferred method for GKE (platform-native, zero-secret)
Uses correct CRD name 'InfisicalSecret' for syncing secrets
Does not recommend deprecated API Keys or Service Tokens as auth methods
Covers Kubernetes service account setup for K8s Auth
References creating a machine identity in Infisical
